steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The sentence says the reasons for linking Valle-Inclan to the Generation of '98 may seem one way, but the link still risks missing subtleties in his style. The blank must make those reasons sound persuasive so that the warning after 'but' creates a real contrast.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means inconsistent, which would already make the link doubtful. Choice B means showy or self-important, which is also negative. Choice C means controversial or debate-provoking, not clearly convincing. The needed word means impossible to deny. The answer is D.
